summary: Frontend-only testing for 4 new features: (1) Calculator background continuous pattern, (2) Booking system preview on addon selection, (3) Dynamic add-ons per package (excludedAddOns), (4) Navigation Onderhoud & Hosting -> /onderhoud. All 12 test requirements verified and PASSED via Playwright automated tests.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Calculator page has continuous flowing background (fixed BG_IMAGE with cover/center, saturate/brightness/contrast filter)
2. PASS: Pro package shows all add-ons EXCEPT extraForm - 'Al inbegrepen in dit pakket: Extra contactformulier' notice shown

3. PASS: Premium package shows ONLY onderhoud addon - multiLanguage, bookingSystem, extraForm all hidden with 'Al inbegrepen in dit pakket: Meertalige website, Online boekingssysteem, Extra contactformulier'
4. PASS: Basic package shows ALL add-ons (multiLanguage, bookingSystem, extraForm, maintenance all visible, no Al inbegrepen notice)
5. PASS: Clicking bookingSystem addon in Pro package shows interactive BookingSystemPreview below it
6. PASS: Booking preview has 5 day tabs (Ma/Di/Wo/Do/Vr) - clicking Wo changes selection to dark background
7. PASS: Booking preview has 6 time slots (09:00-17:00) - clicking 09:00 shows 'Afspraak bevestigen' confirm button
8. PASS: Switching from Premium to Basic resets excluded add-ons (bookingSystem unselected after switch)
9. PASS: Navigation Diensten dropdown shows 'Onderhoud & Hosting' link with href=/onderhoud
10. PASS: Clicking 'Onderhoud & Hosting' navigates to /onderhoud (URL confirmed)
11. PASS: /diensten/onderhoud redirects to /onderhoud (React Navigate replace redirect working)
12. PASS: Price summary: Pro (€900) + bookingSystem (€250) = €1150 correctly displayed in right sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: handlePackageChange only resets excluded add-ons when switching TO a package. When switching FROM Premium to Basic, excludedAddOns['basic']=[] so no reset occurs. The previously excluded add-ons (set to false by Premium switch) remain false in Basic - this is correct behavior.
Note: English text in CalculatorPage still says 'within 24 hours' for formSubtitle/successMessage - flagged in iteration_15, still present (may be intentional for Dutch-first app)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16: All 4 new features verified and passing. (1) Calculator continuous background - BG_IMAGE with fixed positioning. (2) BookingSystemPreview component renders below bookingSystem addon when selected, with 5-day tabs and 6 time slots. (3) excludedAddOns constant: basic=[], pro=['extraForm'], premium=['multiLanguage','bookingSystem','extraForm']. (4) Nav /onderhoud link correct + /diensten/onderhoud redirect to /onderhoud working. Price calculation: Pro+bookingSystem=€1150 confirmed.
